textByHash.02d27faf8bea9b53b23b1b387118a0a6849bcf73: Beyond the reef, within the deep, the Kayzertief remains asleep, I know, I know, oh oh oh.
textByHash.97e4f640655e48cd92aff59f1249131ac088bc13: They whisper of a dream to climb across the moon supreme, I know, I know, oh oh oh
textByHash.b61e49f183a52df7b906a913952ceea4075298e4: To visit their watery hall, answer their call, embrace the fall and save us all!
